title: Typesense Collection Schema — iac_entities
description: Unified search collection schema for islamicatlas.org's federated entity search. All canonical entity types (place, dynasty, person, work, manuscript, event) project into a single Typesense collection 'iac_entities' with entity_type as discriminator. This schema is consumed by pipelines/search/full_reindex.py to declare/update the Typesense collection on bootstrap. Field selection is informed by ADR-004 (search-first architecture) and ADR-005 (unified catalog). The corresponding Typesense schema (the live one running in Typesense itself) is generated FROM this schema by search/typesense_schema_emit.py — this is the source of truth, the live one is downstream.

fields.name: id
fields.comment: Canonical PID (e.g., 'iac:place-00000042'). Typesense's primary key.

fields.name: entity_type
fields.comment: Discriminator. enum: place|dynasty|person|work|manuscript|event

fields.name: subtypes
fields.comment: Type subtypes from @type minus the supertype, e.g., ['settlement'] for places, ['caliphate'] for dynasties.

fields.name: prefLabel_en
fields.comment: English preferred label. Infix-indexed for partial-match queries.

fields.name: prefLabel_translit
fields.comment: ALA-LC romanization, ASCII-folded. The most-targeted query field for typo-tolerant Latin-script searches.

fields.name: altLabels
fields.comment: Flattened union of all altLabel arrays across languages. Lower ranking weight than prefLabel_*.

fields.name: description_en
fields.comment: English description, for full-text relevance and snippet generation.

fields.name: _geo
fields.comment: Primary geographic point. For places: coords.lat/lon. For dynasties: first capital coords. For manuscripts: current_library coords. For events: location coords. For persons: birth_place coords (if available). For works: composition place coords (P0.3+).

fields.name: century_ce
fields.comment: CE century bucket. Computed from temporal.start_ce // 100 + 1 (e.g., 750 → 8th c.). Negative for BCE.

fields.name: century_ah
fields.comment: AH century bucket. Computed from temporal.start_ah // 100 + 1.

fields.name: start_year_ce
fields.comment: Sortable year-precision start (CE). Used for chronological sort_by parameter.

fields.name: iqlim
fields.comment: Containing great-region(s). For places: falls_within_iqlim resolved to iqlim labels. For dynasties: territory iqlim memberships. For persons/works: derived from active_in_places.

fields.name: source_layer
fields.comment: Atlas data layers contributing to this entity. From provenance.derived_from + place.derived_from_layers. Common values: yaqut, le-strange, makdisi, evliya-celebi, ibn-battuta, salibiyyat, darp-islam, konya-city-atlas, science-layer, bosworth, manual.

fields.name: language
fields.comment: Languages associated with the entity (labels languages, work original_language, manuscript languages).

fields.name: has_coords
fields.comment: Computed: true iff _geo is populated. Enables filtering to mappable entities.

fields.name: has_wikidata
fields.comment: Computed: true iff authority_xref contains a wikidata entry.

fields.name: wikidata_qid
fields.comment: Wikidata QID denormalized for direct outbound link rendering.

fields.name: place_subtype
fields.comment: Type-specific. Place: settlement|region|iqlim.

fields.name: dynasty_subtype
fields.comment: Type-specific. Dynasty: caliphate|sultanate|emirate|imamate|beylik.

fields.name: person_profession
fields.comment: Type-specific. Person: profession array.

fields.name: work_genre
fields.comment: Type-specific. Work: genre array.

fields.name: manuscript_library
fields.comment: Type-specific. Manuscript: current_library prefLabel.en (denormalized for facet).

fields.name: manuscript_script
fields.comment: Type-specific. Manuscript: script.

fields.name: event_subtype
fields.comment: Type-specific. Event: battle|treaty|founding|...; mirrors @type subtype.

fields.name: related_pids
fields.comment: Flat union of all PID references this entity makes (located_in, predecessor, successor, authors, witnesses_work, etc.). Enables 'related to iac:dynasty-00000003' filter queries.

fields.name: related_labels
fields.comment: Denormalized prefLabels of all related entities (across languages, deduplicated). Critical for cross-entity search: query 'Sayf al-Dawla' hits Halep place doc because Hamdānid dynasty (whose prefLabel includes 'Sayf al-Dawla' family) is related to Halep.

fields.name: deprecated
fields.comment: Soft-delete flag from provenance.deprecated. Default-filtered out unless explicit include_deprecated=true.

fields.name: _score
fields.comment: Computed ranking score, populated by the projector. Combination of has_wikidata, has_coords, capital_status, manual_curation. Used as default_sorting_field.

fields.name: modified_at
fields.comment: Unix timestamp of provenance.modified, for tie-breaker recency sort.
